title: Governed Execution Controller
summary: Add bounded execution state transitions, retry/time/change budgets, stop/escalation rules, checkpoints, and agent dispatch behind explicit human approval.
original_problem: No current component safely turns a selected candidate into a bounded agent execution while preserving authority, evidence, retry limits, rollback, and reconstruction.
why_it_matters: This is the execution half of the loop, but it is unsafe until read-only evaluation has proven the contracts and failure modes.
reason_frozen: Must follow the asset manifest and read-only loop; execution authority cannot be introduced on unvalidated observations.
preserved_value: Loop controller, WIP enforcement, attempt/time/diff budgets, provider abstraction, checkpoint/resume, structured failure and human escalation.
trigger_conditions: Rollback and emergency stop contracts tested
source_refs: RTS-Hermes-Drive orchestration asset via asset manifest
RTS-AGE provider adapter/dry-run assets via asset manifest
